summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Cash Piloting Dashboard Phase 3 features. All 21 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing verified all 6 Phase 3 features: Matrix endpoint matching projection, Actuals & Variance system, Undo system, Entry Log tab, Recurrence toggle with Repeat/Distribute, and Matrix UX.

console_warnings.issue: Chart width/height warnings (-1) during tab switching - non-blocking

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test data with cleanup fixtures
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 features fully tested and working: 1) Matrix endpoint (/api/projection/matrix) returns revenue_rows, expense_rows, net_per_month, months - net values EXACTLY match /api/projection months.net values. 2) Actuals & Variance system - PUT /api/flow-occurrences with actual_amount and variance_action (carry_forward creates carryover, write_off does not). DELETE /api/flow-occurrences clears actual. Projection uses actual_amount when recorded. 3) Undo system - POST /api/undo reverses last action, GET /api/undo/peek shows has_undo and description. Works for create, edit, delete, batch_create. 4) Entry Log is now a full-page tab with search, category filter, type filter, parent/child grouping. 5) Quick Add shows Recurrence dropdown in main form, Repeat/Distribute toggle visible when recurrence selected, per-period preview shown for distribute mode. 6) Matrix UX - row labels clickable (open edit dialog), row/column hover highlighting, frozen first column.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/projection/matrix returns revenue_rows, expense_rows, net_per_month, months
Backend: Matrix net_per_month values EXACTLY match GET /api/projection months.net values
Backend: Matrix endpoint respects entity_id filter
Backend: Matrix endpoint respects horizon parameter (12, 24, 36)
Backend: PUT /api/flow-occurrences with actual_amount and variance_action=carry_forward creates carryover
Backend: PUT /api/flow-occurrences with actual_amount and variance_action=write_off does NOT create carryover
Backend: DELETE /api/flow-occurrences clears actual and removes carryover
Backend: GET /api/month-details returns all_flows with planned_amount, actual_amount, variance_action
Backend: Projection engine uses actual_amount when recorded (replaces planned in projection)
Backend: GET /api/undo/peek returns has_undo and description of last action
Backend: Creating a flow pushes to undo stack, undo deletes it
Backend: Editing a flow pushes to undo stack, undo restores previous values
Backend: Deleting a flow pushes to undo stack, undo restores it
Backend: Batch create pushes one undo entry, undo removes all created flows (parent+children)
Backend: POST /api/undo when stack is empty returns nothing_to_undo
Backend: GET /api/cash-flows/with-linked returns parent/child grouping
Backend: Entry log shows parent/child grouping with linked flow indicators
Frontend: Projection tab has KPIs, chart, quick add, monthly breakdown, P&L panel
Frontend: Cash Flow Table tab shows matrix derived from projection engine
Frontend: Entries tab shows full-page entry log with search, category filter, type filter
Frontend: Entry log shows parent/child grouping with linked flow indicators
Frontend: Entry log edit/delete actions work
Frontend: Quick Add shows Recurrence dropdown in main form (not hidden under More)
Frontend: When recurrence is set, Repeat/Distribute toggle visible with per-period preview
Frontend: Undo button visible in header when actions exist
Frontend: Matrix row labels are clickable (open edit dialog)
Frontend: Matrix has row and column hover highlighting
Frontend: P&L panel shows Record actual button for each flow
Frontend: Tab switching between Projection, Cash Flow Table, Entries works

matrix_endpoint.details: GET /api/projection/matrix returns revenue_rows, expense_rows, net_per_month, months. Net values exactly match projection endpoint. Respects entity_id and horizon parameters.

actuals_variance_system.details: PUT /api/flow-occurrences with actual_amount and variance_action. carry_forward creates carryover in next month, write_off does not. DELETE clears actual and removes carryover. Projection uses actual when recorded.

undo_system.details: POST /api/undo reverses last action. GET /api/undo/peek shows has_undo and description. Works for create (deletes flow), edit (restores previous values), delete (restores flow), batch_create (removes all created flows).

entry_log_tab.details: Full-page Entry Log tab with search, category filter, type filter. Shows parent/child grouping with linked flow indicators. Edit/delete actions work.

recurrence_toggle.details: Recurrence dropdown visible in main Quick Add form. When Monthly/Quarterly selected, Repeat/Distribute toggle appears. Distribute mode shows per-period preview (e.g., CHF 3000/month for 36000 total ÷ 12 periods).

matrix_ux.details: Row labels clickable (open edit dialog). Row and column hover highlighting. Frozen first column. 15 clickable row labels, 180 cells for hover highlighting.
